description: BRICS Coin (BC) emerged in 2023 on Ethereum and BSC, and later on Solana, as a global utility token launched for BRICS economies, with 30% of BC allocated to BRICS country governments. NOW on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 BC gives all BC holders instant finality, fixed ultra-low gas fee, and AI contract capability, turning it into a much faster, more secure and scalable asset in the Atlantis Kingdom.
name: BRICS Coin
